game_name: Ayrton Senna's Super Monaco GP II

element_introduction_order.mastery_context: automatic easier to control; manual provides greater speed—player trades accessibility for performance
failure to qualify results in 12th place penalty—establishes stakes and track familiarity requirement
16-race season with 15 AI opponents; lap count increases from 3 (Beginner) to 6 (Master)
optional completion grants Ayrton Senna Super License—post-championship content

typical_tension_triggers: extended lap counts in Master mode (6 laps vs 3)
maintaining optimal racing line at high speeds
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: steady competitive pressure across 16-race season; sustained tension from mandatory qualifying and AI opposition; relief cycles tied to race completion and championship progression

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Senna GP mode (3 fictional tracks) accessible after World Championship completion—not required for progression

difficulty_curve.early_game: Beginner mode: 3-lap races, automatic transmission available, simplified qualifying requirements
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Master mode introduction: 6-lap races, 15 AI competitors, manual transmission mastery required for competitive times
difficulty_curve.late_game: 16-race championship completion; Senna GP mode unlocked as post-game content with three additional fantasy tracks
notable_spikes: transition from Beginner (3 laps) to Master (6 laps) doubles endurance requirement
manual transmission selection demands fine motor control and track knowledge
qualifying system penalizes poor performance with 12th place grid position

notable_level_patterns.description: 16 sequential races mirroring 1991 F1 calendar; each race preceded by mandatory qualification round; cumulative points progression across season
notable_level_patterns.example_level: World Championship mode (races at Monaco, Suzuka, Monza, etc.)

notable_level_patterns.description: Beginner mode (3 laps, easier physics) serves as tutorial pathway; Master mode (6 laps, realistic physics) unlocks harder challenge; Senna GP mode (3 fantasy tracks) requires championship completion
notable_level_patterns.example_level: World Championship Beginner vs Master difficulty fork

notable_level_patterns.description: player choice between automatic (accessibility/control), 4-speed semi-automatic (compromise), 7-speed manual (speed/complexity) before each race—persistent mechanical learning curve
notable_level_patterns.example_level: applies to all 19 tracks via pre-race setup
